projectDescription: A Linux desktop lyrics widget that displays real-time song lyrics on KDE Plasma panels, integrating with music players via MPRIS2 and online lyric sources.
keyFeatures: Real-time lyrics display on KDE Plasma panels
LRC file parsing with millisecond precision
Multiple lyric providers: local files, MPRIS2 metadata, NetEase Cloud Music
WebSocket API for custom frontends and integrations
Configurable text appearance: font size, color, character limit
OBS Studio integration via Python plugin
publicApiSurface: GET /ws — WebSocket endpoint for real-time lyric updates
WebSocket message id=0: update_lyric_line (text, alt, time)
Lyric providers: Mpris2Text, File, YesPlayMusic, NeteaseTrackID, SPlayer, FeelUOwnNetease, Netease
